nasb.text: But the centurion was more persuaded by the pilot and the captain of the ship than by what was being said by Paul.

esv.text: But the centurion paid more attention to the pilot and to the owner of the ship than to what Paul said.

cnv.text: 但百夫長寧願相信船長和船主的話，卻不相信保羅所說的。

ccb.text: 但那百夫长只相信船主和舵手的话，不接受保罗的劝告。

csbs.text: 可是百夫长信任了船长和船主，不信任保罗所说的，
